channel.title: POLITICO Pulse
channel.description: Delivered daily by 10 a.m., Pulse examines the latest news in health care politics and policy.

item.title: US Ebola response blowback
item.description: The Ebola quarantine and treatment facility the Trump administration is setting up in Kenya for Americans exposed to or infected with the virus is ruffling some feathers.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: The NIH animal testing debate rages on
item.description: A fight centering around a Wisconsin beagle breeding facility has made it to Congress.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Dueling narratives around lagging ACA signups
item.description: What’s causing a decline in Obamacare coverage enrollment? It depends on who you ask.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Up next in the Medicaid fraud-busting wars
item.description: On Thursday, the Trump administration launched “the largest autism fraud bust in American history,” according to Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: The outbreak information wars
item.description: Some Americans — many who consider themselves part of Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s Make America Healthy Again movement — don’t trust what they’re hearing about either virus.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Trump’s fund: Payday for abortion protesters?
item.description: Abortion clinic protesters could stand to gain from a fund that the Trump administration says will pay people who believe they have been “victims of lawfare and weaponization” from the federal government.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Obamacare outlook dims
item.description: The full impact of Congress failing to extend enhanced Obamacare subsidies at the end of last year is becoming clearer.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: Cassidy’s loss is a MAHA win
item.description: Senate Health Chair Bill Cassidy went down in his GOP primary Saturday, and the loss could represent a major win for Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: Stopping mail-order abortions proves a tough task
item.description: The Supreme Court on Thursday temporarily preserved online and mail-order access to the abortion drug mifepristone while lower federal judges work through the thorny legal issues at play.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: California’s Medicaid-funding dilemma
item.description: The Trump administration is cutting Medicaid payments to California — to the tune of $1.3 billion.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Makary ouster spurs GOP friction
item.description: The resignation of President Donald Trump’s Food and Drug Administration commissioner Tuesday ruffled some feathers in Washington.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: Is Congress stalling the MAHA agenda?
item.description: The food and beverage industry’s “stranglehold” on Congress appears to be hampering some of the Make America Healthy Again movement’s aspirations of cracking down on unhealthy food.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: An American tests positive for hantavirus
item.description: The hantavirus outbreak that began on a Dutch cruise ship has sickened an American.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: To sway GOP, hospitals recruit a party insider
item.description: The Federation of American Hospitals has a new top lobbyist.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Insurers’ bright start to 2026
item.description: Major health insurers started 2026 with better-than-expected financial performances.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: Trump and Makary’s fruit-flavored vape tiff
item.description: President Donald Trump and his FDA Commissioner, Marty Makary, have been on different pages about whether the FDA should authorize fruity vape flavors.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: HHS targets ‘overmedication’
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced new actions Monday to decrease the number of Americans being prescribed psychiatric drugs.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: The GOP health care vision
item.description: Since January, hundreds of thousands more Obamacare enrollees have been opting for health plans that cover a lot less of their care.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper

item.title: 4 facts about the new surgeon general nominee
item.description: President Donald Trump has named his third nominee for the surgeon general.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: MAHA approach gets insurance boost
item.description: Health insurers are expanding their coverage of functional medicine services — a care approach in line with top priorities of the MAHA movement.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: The debate over NIH’s research revamp
item.description: The National Institutes of Health is shaking up its process for soliciting research ideas and awarding grants to scientists.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: RFK Jr.’s global vaccine funding demand
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is holding up $600 million in vaccines for developing countries over disputed safety claims.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: MAHA PAC’s money mystery
item.description: The MAHA PAC has reported only three donations so far this year.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: GOP faces Planned Parenthood funding dilemma
item.description: Anti-abortion activists and some GOP lawmakers warn that the push from Republican leadership for a narrow party-line bill could trigger the return of hundreds of millions in Medicaid funding to Planned Parenthood.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: Cassidy and Kennedy face off
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy, Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s biggest Republican critic in Congress, is locked into a heated primary.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Takeaways from RFK Jr.’s big day on the Hill
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. appeared before Congress for the fifth time in two weeks on Tuesday — touting, and defending, the president’s budget request for the Department of Health and Human Services.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper

item.title: Special edition: POLITICO Health Care Summit highlights
item.description: Republicans and Democrats agree: Soaring health care costs will be a pivotal issue in the midterms. But they have very different ideas on what to do about it.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper

item.title: What lies ahead for US health care
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: Testing MAHA’s political prowess
item.description: Make America Healthy Again leaders are trying to sway a key Louisiana Senate primary.
item.dc:creator: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner
item.dc:contributor: By Kelly Hooper and Sophie Gardner

item.title: MAHA leaders skeptical of Trump’s CDC pick
item.description: The Trump administration has selected former deputy U.S. surgeon general Erica Schwartz as its long-awaited CDC nominee.
item.dc:creator: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
item.dc:contributor: By Sophie Gardner and Kelly Hooper
